_comment: Contact details (email, phone) are plausible placeholder-format examples for demo purposes only and must be verified before real-world use.

listings.name: SiteMinder
listings.description: SiteMinder is a leading hotel channel manager and commerce platform that synchronizes rates and availability across hundreds of OTAs, GDS, and metasearch channels in real time. It also offers a direct booking engine and payments solution for independent hotels and chains.
usps: Largest global channel manager by hotel count
Full commerce platform beyond just distribution

listings.name: RateGain
listings.description: RateGain is a global hospitality and travel technology provider offering channel management, rate intelligence, and distribution software for hotels, airlines, and car rental companies. Its channel manager syncs rates and inventory across a wide network of online travel agencies.
usps: Publicly listed with broad enterprise scale
Serves hotels, airlines, and car rental verticals

listings.name: STAAH
listings.description: STAAH is a channel management and booking engine provider serving independent hotels and small chains across Asia-Pacific, offering rate and inventory synchronization to a large network of OTAs. It also provides a direct booking engine and website solutions.

listings.name: Cloudbeds Channel Manager
listings.description: Cloudbeds' Channel Manager module synchronizes rates and inventory across major OTAs and GDS as part of the company's broader hospitality management platform. It is used by independent hotels and hostels that also run Cloudbeds PMS and booking engine.
usps: Deep native integration with Cloudbeds PMS suite

listings.name: D-EDGE Channel Manager
listings.description: D-EDGE offers a channel manager that connects hotels to OTAs, GDS, and metasearch engines as part of its broader distribution and marketing technology suite, historically incubated within the Accor hotel group. It serves independent and chain hotels across Europe and beyond.
usps: Born from Accor's internal hotel-tech expertise

listings.name: eZee Centrix
listings.description: eZee Centrix is a channel management system from eZee Technosys that synchronizes hotel rates and availability across OTAs, GDS, and its own booking engine, popular with independent hotels in Asia, Africa, and the Middle East. It integrates tightly with eZee's PMS product.

listings.name: AxisRooms
listings.description: AxisRooms is a hospitality technology provider based in India offering channel management, booking engine, and revenue management tools for independent hotels and small chains. It focuses on affordable distribution technology for emerging market hoteliers.

listings.name: Vertical Booking
listings.description: Vertical Booking is an Italian channel manager and booking engine provider serving independent hotels and chains across Europe, synchronizing rates and availability with a broad network of OTAs and GDS. It also offers PMS integration and revenue management add-ons.
usps: Strong Italian and Southern European presence

listings.name: NextPax
listings.description: NextPax provides channel management and distribution technology specifically tailored for vacation rentals and serviced apartments, connecting property managers to OTAs like Airbnb, Vrbo, and Booking.com. It focuses on the alternative accommodation segment rather than traditional hotels.
usps: Specialist focus on vacation rentals/serviced apartments
Deep API connectivity to alternative accommodation OTAs
Strong European vacation rental market presence

listings.name: HotelRunner
listings.description: HotelRunner is a cloud-based channel manager and booking engine platform serving hotels and vacation rental operators, with strong adoption across Turkey, the Middle East, and Europe. It bundles distribution, direct booking, and marketing tools into one dashboard.
usps: Strong Turkish and Middle East market leadership
Combines hotel and vacation rental distribution

listings.name: Yanolja Cloud Solution (eZee)
listings.description: Yanolja Cloud Solution, formed after Yanolja's acquisition of eZee Technosys, continues to operate eZee's PMS and channel manager products while expanding hospitality technology reach across Asia. It combines eZee's regional strength with Yanolja's broader travel-tech backing.

listings.name: dailypoint
listings.description: dailypoint is a hotel CRM and distribution data platform from Austria that consolidates guest, rate, and channel data across systems, offering channel management alongside marketing and loyalty tools. It targets hotel groups seeking unified guest and distribution data.
usps: Focus on unifying guest data across systems
Strong DACH region hotel group adoption

listings.name: WebRezPro Channel Manager
listings.description: WebRezPro's built-in channel manager synchronizes rates and availability across major OTAs for hotels, hostels, and vacation rental operators using the WebRezPro PMS platform. It is offered as an integrated module rather than a standalone product.

listings.name: Smartvel
listings.description: Smartvel provides destination content and experience-enrichment technology that integrates with airline, OTA, and hotel channel platforms to surface local activities, events, and travel information alongside bookings. It complements channel managers by adding contextual destination data.
usps: Specialist destination content layer for distribution platforms
Strong airline and OTA partner integrations

listings.name: HotelRunner Marketplace Sync
listings.description: HotelRunner's Marketplace Sync extends its core channel manager with expanded connectivity to regional OTAs and marketplaces across the Middle East, Central Asia, and Eastern Europe, helping hotels reach niche local booking sites alongside global OTAs.
usps: Deep regional marketplace reach beyond global OTAs
Local market expertise in emerging regions
